author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Closed 285 stale issues (48 now + 237 in the first bulk pass before the signing fix + orphan-lock cleanup). Remaining 6 open: #681 #684 #685 #686 #687 #689 — all legit bug/feature work from the last week. Dashboard went from 292 open to 6. Hub commits from this cleanup are now signed by the driver key and verify on GitHub natively (signing fix landed in #718 mid-run).
